why: Executive truth surfaces should be scan-fast and avoid page sprawl.
One page is enough when the goal is source truth rather than workflow management.
Managers need a compact decision arc from KPI signal to action queue.
The best local manager surfaces separate summary, trend, drivers, and exceptions cleanly.
Control towers should be compact and explicitly organized around ownership, handoffs, and process quality.
A control tower should hand off into a follow-up surface instead of becoming a giant all-in-one dashboard.
Rep surfaces should begin with work-now context and keep the queue close to the user.
Follow-up and target-account pages are valid only when they directly reinforce the queue.
The best native reports in this environment are owner-accountability lists, not executive stories.
If the ask is follow-up or intervention, the report should stay tabular and hand off to richer diagnostics when needed.
Executive mix surfaces should stay tight: one summary view and one decomposition view.
Deeper follow-up should happen in a linked report or manager surface rather than expanding the executive dashboard.

surface_exemplars.label: Forecast & Revenue Motions
why_excellent: Ends with explicit exception handling rather than stopping at summary metrics.

surface_exemplars.label: Lead Funnel
why_excellent: Demand funnel follows the same compact manager operating-system structure as revenue.
Good exemplar for a reusable four-page page model.

surface_exemplars.label: Commercial Rhythm Control Tower
why_excellent: Compact control-tower structure with explicit ownership and process sections.
Good exemplar for executive/manager hybrid handoff design.

surface_exemplars.label: BDR Manager
why_excellent: Manager operating system keeps cadence, targeting, and action center separate.
Action Center makes the intervention path explicit.

surface_exemplars.label: BDR Rep Queue
why_excellent: Queue-first rep page model starts with immediate work and follow-up.
Supports specialization without losing target-account context.

surface_exemplars.label: Revenue Retention & Health
why_excellent: Retention operating system keeps summary, trend, pipeline, and risk decomposition separate.
Good exemplar for renewal/churn manager design.

surface_exemplars.label: Executive Product Mix & Industry
why_excellent: Summary plus breakdown is a cleaner executive mix pattern than large multi-page decomposition.
